slides.headline: A carpenter we work with builds feature walls that go viral. Then the DMs bury him.
slides.body: One reel pops off — and so does his inbox. Swipe.

slides.headline: Suddenly there's 80 'how much?' messages.
slides.body: And he's on the tools, not glued to his phone.

slides.headline: By the time he replied, the moment was gone.
slides.body: And so was the lead — off to whoever answered first.

slides.headline: We put a speed-to-lead system on his Instagram.
slides.body: Every DM gets an instant reply, shares the pricing basics, and books consults with the serious ones.

slides.headline: The reel keeps working after he's put the phone down.
Content brings the leads — does your inbox lose them?
slides.save: Save this if your DMs are the bottleneck
